   Your Personal AI Academic Operating System
====================================================

YOUR PRIVATE APP LINK:
https://jackrkingsbury-byte.github.io/Escape/

YOUR ACCESS CODE:
FORGE-X7Q2

----------------------------------------------------
HOW TO START (30 seconds):
----------------------------------------------------
1. Tap the link above (works on any phone, tablet
   or computer).
2. Type your access code:  FORGE-X7Q2
3. Tap "Unlock" — you're in!
4. Enter your name and pick Global or South Africa mode.

TIP: Tap "Explore with demo data" to see the whole
system fully loaded with example marks and scores.

----------------------------------------------------
GOOD TO KNOW:
----------------------------------------------------
- You only enter the code ONCE per device.
- Your marks, streaks and data save automatically
  and PRIVATELY on your own device. No accounts.
- Add it to your home screen for an app-like feel:
  Share button -> "Add to Home Screen".

----------------------------------------------------
Questions, or lost your code?
Message us any time — we reply fast.

Loving it? A 5-star review keeps the free
updates coming. Thank you & go dominate! 🚀
